notes: Use Rust 2024 idioms and prefer file-based modules over mod.rs for new code.
Keep shared contracts in smaller foundational modules and keep I/O boundaries at the edge.

layers.name: kernel
layers.description: shared serializable models and narrow cross-slice contracts

layers.name: app
layers.description: workflow orchestration and task-level use cases

layers.name: domain
layers.description: core reusable logic and domain models

layers.name: adapters
layers.description: storage, parsing, transport, and external boundaries

layers.name: transport
layers.description: CLI, HTTP, TUI, or RPC entrypoints only

legacyZones.reason: Replace catch-all roots with responsibility-specific modules.

notes: Prefer new submodules under a declared layer or under src/bin/ for additional binaries instead of new top-level src/*.rs files.

rules.reason: Rust module files should use descriptive snake_case names.
Rust module directories should be responsibility-specific and snake_case.
